name: Solid Year Co., Ltd.
summary: Solid Year Co., Ltd. engages in the production of various single-shot and double-shot plastic injection finished products. Its products include computer keyboard, USB network camera, USB network camera module, driving recorder, hunting machine, projector, gamepad, automotive electronics, in-car multimedia audio and video system, smart rear-view mirror, head-up display, iPhone Computer electronic peripheral products, such as Car Box, infant network surveillance camera, etc. The company was founded in 1975 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
